this_slice_contribution: Regression antibody only — no production code change. Pins helper + ObsV2Row constructor + writer round-trip end-to-end so any future refactor of the field/helper/writer surfaces in tests immediately.

departures_from_g6_pattern.skipped_red_commit: Production code is pre-correct (writer + callers + script all shipped before). RED-then-GREEN ritual would be theatre. Single GREEN commit is honest scoping.
departures_from_g6_pattern.did_not_add_hard_reject: Flag remains annotative by design. Promoting to a contract gate (e.g., reject obs_v2 row with local_timestamp in DST gap but is_missing_local_hour=0) would be a separate operator decision.

lore_extraction_recommendation: If a future slice promotes is_missing_local_hour to hard-reject contract, extract a 'DST flag contract' lore card. Until then, the antibody is sufficient.
